$comment: Response shape for GET /api/dashboard (unified campus dashboard).

card.id: string — stable id for dedupe and client keys
card.title: string
card.priority: number — lower = higher priority within a section
card.feed_role: optional: news | events | announcements when from RSS

response.partial: true if any source failed but payload is still useful
response.sources: object of source name -> { ok, ms, error }
response.campus_links: array of { title, url, icon? } from pulse.links; icon is a favicon URL for UI tiles
response.preferences: optional echo of server-stored prefs when present
